name: Brisk Walking
instructions: Walk at a pace that makes talking possible but slightly challenging.
Keep shoulders relaxed and swing your arms naturally.
Aim to maintain the pace for the full duration.

name: Treadmill Intervals
instructions: Warm up for 5 minutes at an easy pace.
Alternate 1 minute fast with 2 minutes easy for 6 rounds.
Cool down for 5 minutes.

name: Bodyweight Strength Circuit
instructions: Complete 3 rounds of squats, incline push-ups, lunges, and planks.
Rest 45 seconds between rounds.
Move with controlled form rather than speed.

name: Upper Body Dumbbell Session
instructions: Perform shoulder press, bent-over row, curls, and tricep extensions.
Use 3 sets of 10 to 12 reps per movement.
Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Lower Body Strength
instructions: Perform goblet squats, Romanian deadlifts, step-ups, and calf raises.
Complete 3 rounds with controlled tempo.
Rest 60 seconds between rounds.

name: Mobility Reset
instructions: Move through cat-cow, thoracic rotations, hip openers, and hamstring stretches.
Hold each stretch for 30 to 45 seconds.
Breathe slowly and avoid forcing range.

name: Desk Stretch Flow
instructions: Complete neck rolls, chest opens, seated twists, and hamstring reaches.
Keep movements smooth and pain-free.

name: Morning Yoga Flow
instructions: Move through sun salutations, low lunge, downward dog, and child's pose.
Match movement with breath.

name: Power Yoga Session
instructions: Flow through warrior sequences, chair pose, plank holds, and balance poses.
Keep core engaged through transitions.

name: Beginner HIIT
instructions: Alternate 30 seconds work and 30 seconds rest.
Use marching jacks, air squats, step-back lunges, and mountain climbers.

name: Advanced HIIT Blast
instructions: Alternate 40 seconds work and 20 seconds rest.
Use burpees, jump squats, skaters, and plank jacks.

name: Cycling Session
instructions: Warm up for 8 minutes.
Ride at a moderate pace with 5 short harder pushes.
Cool down for the final 5 minutes.
